next_steps: Perform endoscopic-guided biopsy of the nasopharyngeal mass with tissue sent for histopathology and immunohistochemical staining
Send serum for ANCA (PR3 and MPO) and IgG4 levels
Order a positron emission tomography (PET/CT) scan to evaluate for systemic involvement and identify optimal biopsy sites
Obtain rheumatology and otorhinolaryngology consultations for multidisciplinary management
Initiate urgent high-dose systemic corticosteroid therapy if suspicion for systemic vasculitis remains high and infectious causes are excluded
